q:let @c
        MMetreg('a', ':s/^\s*\(\S*\)\s*,\s*\(\S*\)\s*,\s*\(\S*\)\s*$/\U\3;\U\2;\U\1;OK\r')
call setreg('b', '0')
call setreg('c', '^')
%normal! @a
%normal! @b
%normal! @c
:wq
EOF
head -n 3 input.csv > /tmp/testfinal.csv
vim -Nu NONE -n /tmp/testfinal.csv -S /app/apply_macros.vim
cat /tmp/testfinal.csv
python3 << 'EOF' > /app/apply_macros.vim
macro = r":s/^\\s*\\(\\S*\\)\\s*,\\s*\\(\\S*\\)\\s*,\\s*\\(\\S*\\)\\s*$/\\U\\3;\\U\\2;\\U\\1;OK\r"
print('call setreg(\'a\', \'' + macro + '\')')
print('call setreg(\'b\', \'0\')')
print('call setreg(\'c\', \'^\')')
print('%normal! @a')
print('%normal! @b')
print('%normal! @c')
print(':wq')
EOF
cat /app/apply_macros.vim
1;BETA1;ALPHA1;OK
